title: STATUTES
doc_html:
CHAPTER 3.  STATUTES

PART I.  GENERAL PROVISIONS

§151.  Enrolled bills; typewritten with indelible ink

The official enrolled bills of the legislature shall be typewritten with indelible ink.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 3.  STATUTES
PART I.  GENERAL PROVISIONS
§151.  Enrolled bills; typewritten with indelible ink
The official enrolled bills of the legislature shall be typewritten with indelible ink.
